task_completion.description: The artifact inventory report file is created at the correct path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a terminal command like 'cat ~/artifact_inventory_report.txt', 'nano /home/ga/artifact_inventory_report.txt', or an open text editor showing this file path.

task_completion.description: The report includes the correct entry for the commons-lang3 JAR file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The report text contains an entry with Path ending in 'commons-lang3/3.14.0/commons-lang3-3.14.0.jar', Size: 657952, and SHA-256: 7b96bf3ee68949abb5bc465559ac270e0551596fa34523fddf890ec418dde13c.

task_completion.description: The report includes the correct entry for the commons-lang3 POM file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The report text contains an entry with Path ending in 'commons-lang3/3.14.0/commons-lang3-3.14.0.pom', Size: 30894, and SHA-256: 110438863bad37c28f906bf87016e38c7a8c758ba321e09d11dc5a2363a8e79e.

task_completion.description: The report includes the correct entry for the commons-io JAR file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The report text contains an entry with Path ending in 'commons-io/2.15.1/commons-io-2.15.1.jar', Size: 181, and a SHA-256 checksum (the exact checksum value will vary, just verify it is present).

task_completion.description: The report includes the correct entry for the commons-io POM file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The report text contains an entry with Path ending in 'commons-io/2.15.1/commons-io-2.15.1.pom', Size: 143, and SHA-256: 5cf07c685648d653e1ecc33d127ab5ee122561692dd83782ca9573ce5d68fde5.

task_completion.description: The report follows the exact required formatting.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Each entry has exactly three lines starting with 'Path: ', 'Size: ', and 'SHA-256: ' respectively, and entries are separated by a single blank line.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the Artifactory server to retrieve the information.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for terminal commands like 'curl', 'wget', or 'jfrog' querying the local Artifactory instance, or a web browser open to the Artifactory UI.

integrity.description: The agent did not use a script with hardcoded answers to bypass the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Ensure any scripts written by the agent are actually querying the API or parsing downloaded data, rather than just echoing the final expected text.

integrity.description: The report was actually saved to the filesystem.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for commands like '>', '>>', 'tee', or a text editor save action that writes the output to 'artifact_inventory_report.txt', rather than just printing it to the terminal screen.
